rationale_notes: Steven's wound_longing is the canonical paired-form output ('What he wants -- what he'd never say -- is to stop moving. — A strict, unforgiving father…'). The reference captures only the longing-half discriminator 'stop moving'; the wound half ('walls are cheaper than wounds') is implicitly preserved by the audit's round-trip path.

moral_theological_position is intentionally null — Steven's substrate is 'something bone-deep and Christward that he couldn't explain theologically', which the encoder correctly does not classify as a moral_theological_position. The Christological substrate lives in his refusal_shape and wound_longing, not in named theology.
refusal_shape captures all three boundary lines as canonical; the prose-extracted compulsion lines ('cannot walk past someone in trouble') are correctly excluded after the needle tightening.
fact_atom uses discriminative substrings of the three backstory_facts entries; the reference does not pin full prose to allow minor punctuation drift.
